name: documentation
description: Agent skill that provides expert technical writing capabilities for software documentation, following the Diátaxis framework.

interface.longDescription: Packages a documentation workflow for planning and writing tutorials, how-to guides, reference material, and explanations using the Diátaxis framework.
defaultPrompt: Use the writer skill to help me plan documentation for this feature.
Draft a Diátaxis-style how-to guide for this workflow.
Review this documentation outline and classify it as tutorial, how-to, reference, or explanation.
